programme.desc: A new age evangelist tells Florida investors that positive thinking can lead to positive returns in her auto financing business; a man steals millions to build a luxurious doomsday bunker.

programme.title: American Greed

programme.title: American Greed

programme.title: American Greed

programme.title: American Greed

programme.title: American Greed

programme.title: American Greed

programme.title: American Greed

programme.title: Lockup: Raw

programme.title: Lockup: Raw

programme.title: Ancient Aliens

programme.title: Ancient Aliens

programme.title: Ancient Aliens

programme.title: Ancient Aliens

programme.title: Ancient Aliens

programme.title: Ancient Aliens

programme.title: Ancient Aliens

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In the Lake District, Margie buys a French carriage clock, a Chinese pepperette and a candlestick from Derbyshire. Tim falls for the image of a Victorian woman, though his Victorian horse toy might make for a bumpy ride at auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: On the Isle of Man, Tim Medhurst picks up a captain's chair, a pair of bears and a bronze sculpture of a footballer. Margie Cooper buys an antique corkscrew, a cocktail shaker and a bygone sewing machine complete with all its accessories.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Tim Medhurst finds a harvest jug, a pipe holder and gilt bar brooch. Margie Cooper buys a push-along donkey, a doggy nutcracker and prancing leather horse, but it's a ride on the ghost train that has her rather spooked.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: On their last outing in the campervan, Tim splurges on an old children's toy and finds a Welsh folk art quill stand. Margie Cooper falls in love with a bulldog gong and is convinced this rare piece of Victoriana will attract high bids.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Roo Irvine and a new Road Tripper, Mark Hill, are on the hunt for collectibles around Scotland. Mark buys 1940s ceramics, a ship in a dome and a 1920s French fountain pen while Roo finds some trench art and a piece of Japanese cloisonne.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Roo Irvine falls in love with a set of Art Deco-style silver butter knives and gambles on a little penny bank. Mark Hill springs for an Edwardian writing table in incredible condition and is excited about a rare piece of studio glass.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In the Scottish Highlands, rookie Road Tripper Mark Hill finds a wooden sculpture of a naked torso, while Roo Irvine picks out silver antiques in almost every shop.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Roo Irvine and Mark Hill are as far north on the mainland as they can get! The finds in the Highlands have been great, including some smart whisky glasses and a rare 1950s Bakelite television. Plus, Roo learns about iconic John O'Groats.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Roo Irvine purchases a bonbon dish and a pretty Victorian brooch, and Mark Hill goes for glass – he buys a few colorful items, but his gamble on a microscope could be an expensive mistake. Plus a visit to Loch Katrine.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: South Wales hosts James Braxton and Izzie Balmer and their 1970s two-seater sports car. Izzie buys a monkey-shaped perfume bottle and an obscure medical curio. James can't resist a bamboo table and a pair of sphinx mounts at a great price.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Izzie Balmer and James Braxton travel through Wales and Shropshire. Izzie springs for an 18th century oak coffer and an 1832 sampler. James has high hopes for 1911 silver scallop shell butter dishes and an Edwardian mahogany table.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In northern Wales, James Braxton buys yet more bamboo, this time in the form of a jardiniere stand. Izzie Balmer picks up a novelty money box shaped like a pigeon, but her biggest purchase is a 19th century tramp art box.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: James Braxton and Izzie Balmer hunt for antiques in Snowdonia National Park in Wales, and find scent bottles, brick molds and cloisonne bowls. They also learn about a revolutionary Welsh king and befriend an iconic and "beefy" local.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's James Braxton and Izzie Balmer's last day in Wales, and Izzie strikes gold, finding a bangle, pendant and earrings. James accumulates a hoard of shiny items – and one piece of silver causes a shock at auction.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The crew returns to Ham House in Richmond, where jewelry specialist John Benjamin is amazed to find a necklace and bracelet in a bag of compost; Mark Hill is intrigued by a chessboard designed by filmmaker Derek Jarman.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Antiques Roadshow visits the Bishop's Palace, a site of special religious significance for over 800 years in the heart of Wells in Somerset.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona and the team return to the beautiful grounds of the Royal Botanic Garden in Edinburgh; they find a stunning set of traditional Highland dresses that once belonged to a clan chieftain and a rare Rolex Sea-Dweller watch.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona and the team are at Aston Hall in Birmingham, where treasures include some rare trading beads, memorable items from an Aston Villa legend and a collection of climbing gear from one of history's great mountaineers.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Antiques Roadshow is at Dyffryn Gardens near Cardiff in south Wales; Will Farmer is thrilled to see a huge collection of Clarice Cliff ceramics, including many rarities picked up for just a few pounds.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A collection of 1970s dolls with eyes that change color, made by Blythe's Boutique company; medals awarded to participants in the Easter Rising.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team return to the Royal Botanic Garden Edinburgh; two paintings of three-dimensional raindrops by Korean artist Kim Tschang-Yeul.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team travel to Wells in Somerset to see Fabergé jewelery, a plate by Pugin, and a guitar left behind in England by a soldier.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Items include a DeLorean car, a stone head dug up in a garden and a carving with links to maritime history.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Mientras Hotch lucha por su vida debido a las complicaciones del apuñalamiento a manos de George Foyet, también conocido como "The Reaper", experimenta visiones de su difunta esposa, Haley, y su némesis, Foyet.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la UAC investiga a las víctimas de posibles asesinatos rituales en Utah, las pistas los llevan a creer que el sujeto que buscan podría estar fascinado con los juicios de brujas de Salem.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Después de una serie de estrangulamientos en Boston, la UAC busca un sospechoso al que le guste guardar recuerdos de las víctimas, y el equipo se pregunta si un vínculo común con las víctimas podría llevarlos al culpable.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Verdad o consecuencias
programme.desc: Mientras comienza la búsqueda del sustituto de Ziva, Gibbs y los miembros restantes de su equipo deben volver al trabajo con el pasado todavía pesando en sus mentes.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Reunión
programme.desc: El equipo descubre que la extraña muerte de un marine y sus dos amigos puede estar relacionada con su pasado, pero es Gibbs quien acaba haciendo un viaje al pasado.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Informante
programme.desc: El equipo debe investigar de nuevo la muerte de un teniente después de que el bloguero que les acusó de encubrimiento aparezca muerto.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Policía bueno, policía malo
programme.desc: Cuando el cadáver de un marine aparece al otro lado del mundo, la investigación obliga a Ziva a desenterrar un capítulo enterrado de su vida.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Mata al mensajero
programme.desc: Frank se sorprende en una entrevista en vivo cuando él y el fiscal interino discrepan sobre un tema. Danny y su nuevo jefe chocan en sus métodos y personalidades mientras investigan un tiroteo desde un auto.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El poder de la prensa
programme.desc: Frank enfrenta críticas públicas por una cámara corporal defectuosa durante un altercado. Danny y María protegen a un informante que es rechazado por el programa de protección de testigos.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): A punta de pistola
programme.desc: Danny y Maria investigan asesinatos de líderes comunitarios que parecen crímenes de odio. Frank se reúne con un grupo que busca justicia para las víctimas. Linda es asaltada y decide tomar medidas para aumentar su seguridad.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El pecado de los padres
programme.desc: Frank busca pruebas contra un sospechoso de matar a un policía que disparó a un compañero de Henry hace años. Danny y Baez investigan una serie de asesinatos relacionados con estrellas de cine para adultos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Después de una serie de estrangulamientos en Boston, la UAC busca un sospechoso al que le guste guardar recuerdos de las víctimas, y el equipo se pregunta si un vínculo común con las víctimas podría llevarlos al culpable.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando los adolescentes que fueron reportados como desaparecidos son sospechosos de una serie de asesinatos en masa en Chicago, el UAC investiga su paradero para encontrar el motivo de los crímenes.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentran esqueletos en el patio trasero de una casa de Virginia, la UAC enfoca su investigación en la familia que vive allí, desenterrando secretos familiares arraigados en las pasadas divisiones raciales en el Sur.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Undercover officers set up a sting operation to nab people looking to buy drugs. A woman tries to conceal drugs in her mouth. Then a repeat offender who has a history of threatening officers with a tainted needle is arrested.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Narcotics officers end up in a foot chase during a buy-bust operation. Officers respond to a dispute with a tow truck driver at a strip club. The odor of marijuana on a traffic stop leads to a citation for the cooperative driver.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police investigate an attempted residential robbery that turned deadly. Officers visit a residence to find a suspect facing warrant charges. A high-speed chase comes to an end when the suspect crashes into a fence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer subdues a young man in mental duress before paramedics arrive to treat him. Officers stop a suspicious vehicle and find drug paraphernalia inside the woman's car. Officers respond to a robbery in progress.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers give chase to a suspect on a bike. A vehicle is pulled over and a passenger is arrested for possession of drug paraphernalia. Police are given a classic "I'm holding it for a friend" excuse.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A white-knuckled police chase ends in a dramatic escape and an unsettling officer injury. An intoxicated prowler is reported after a woman spots him in a tree. Officers bring in the K-9 unit to sniff out a suspicious van.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers utilize the help of the K-9 unit to find a suspect hiding in a shed. A cooperative suspect is faced with a list of charges. A motorcycle chase comes to an end after the suspect ditches the stolen bike and attempts to flee on foot.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Prostitute sting operations prove successful for undercover officers in both Wichita, KS and Palm Beach, FL. Officers inform an unsuspecting John that the individual offering up services is likely not who he thinks they are.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An arrest is made in a buy-bust sting operation after a hobbled dealer attempts to flee on foot. An elderly man is questioned after a report that he kicked a juvenile male in the face. A man is shot in the head by his female roommate.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An open container and crack pipe are discovered inside a teen's vehicle. Officers find a man at a nearby residence lifting weights after trying to evade police. A fight involving two men and a shovel is broken up.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police respond to a fight in progress call, officers tail a vehicle leaving a house known for drug activity, and a man calls the police after his wife pushes his Harley over.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police find a burglary suspect up a tree in a California backyard, a parolee at large attempts to flee officers, and a man with a suspended license blows his second chance.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a fight in progress involving mace at a minimart, and a woman tells police that her boyfriend threatened to flush her late husband's ashes down the drain.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man riding a bike at night with no lights decides to take off rather than talk with police, and a dangerous domestic dispute unfolds on the streets of Texas.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer pulls over a man making hand gestures at him while driving, an ex-Marine explains his side of a fight, and a traffic stop reveals a truck full of dogs and drugs.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a call that a man shot up his parents' house, a fleeing suspect hopes a change of clothes will fool the police, and a shaky hit-and-run story unravels.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man's addiction forces his family to call the police for help, a driver abandons his car and tries to evade officers on foot, and a man tries to conceal his illegal stash.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An uncooperative driver leads police on a high-speed chase, and an alleged convenience store robber in custody won't settle down until he gets a kiss from his girlfriend.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A patrol car en route to a call spooks a driver who then takes off at high speed, leading the officers to pursue him instead, and police investigate shots fired on a home.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers deploy a police dog to persuade a reluctant suspect to come down off a roof, and an outdoor birthday celebration is crashed by an alleged drunk driver.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police deploy spike strips to curb a stolen vehicle, a parolee at large speeds away with a two-month-old in the car, and officers try to determine the details of a stabbing.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A patrolman pursues a scooter speeding through a neighborhood, officers try to subdue a raving man, and a woman has issues with her neighbor's dogs.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A cyclist tries to bolt when questioned by police, a deputy uses a cotton swab to procure evidence from a suspect's mouth, and an unmowed lawn triggers a domestic disturbance.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: When officers approach, a suspect flees into a fast-food restaurant. A driver takes his granny's wheels for a dangerous spin with cops in pursuit. Sheriffs catch up to a man who fled the scene of a possible domestic battery.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers stop a fleeing vehicle, and a man with a warrant learns that a doughnut shop is not the best place to hide from the police.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man on the run with a warrant tries to elude police by busting into a residence and hiding under a blanket, and a fleeing cyclist turns apologetic after being caught.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man resisting arrest sics his dogs on the police, and a recovering addict about to take his first hit in years wanders into the path of police in pursuit of another suspect.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a K-9 is blamed for the death of his partner, the CSI team discovers there's more to the case.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Things get personal when D.B. Russell is drawn into the investigation of the death of his son's basketball coach.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the death of a reverend who was killed at the grave site of former CSI Warrick Brown.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When five bodies are found in what appears to be a meteor site in the middle of the desert, CSI Finlay recognizes one of the casualties, prompting her to revisit her past.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team lends a hand to local law enforcement on the strip with several arrests until a John Doe is found in a car. Also, things become personal for Captain Brass when he discovers some facts about his daughter.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When five people are killed in a small plane crash a mile off the Vegas strip, the CSI team is called to investigate.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the demise of a prominent news anchor during a live broadcast.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs need to ace the case involving a rising tennis star. Meanwhile, the CSIs are surprised to hear Hodges is engaged to an Italian bombshell.

programme.title: Chocolate
programme.desc: Johnny Depp y Juliette Binoche protagonizan esta comedia romántica dulce y sexi que enamoró al público y ganó 5 nominaciones al Óscar(r), incluso Mejor Película, que se centra en una chocolatería en un pequeño pueblo francés.

programme.title: Shakespeare apasionado
programme.desc: Lady Viola inspira a Will Shakespeare, cura su bloqueo de escritor y reaviva su amor por el romance. Gwyneth Paltrow, Joseph Fiennes, Ben Affleck y Dame Judi Dench protagonizan esta historia ganadora del Óscar a Mejor Película.

programme.title: El Paciente Inglés
programme.desc: Poderosa e inolvidable, la ganadora de 9 premios Óscar, incluso Mejor Película, Mejor Director (Anthony Minghella) y Mejor Actriz de Reparto (Juliette Binoche), desarrolla una increíble historia de pasión, intriga y aventura.

programme.title: ¿Quién Manda?
programme.desc: Una pareja no comprometida que solo busca diversión. Ellos entran en una batalla de egos mientras se enamoran.

programme.title: Soltero en casa
programme.desc: Tripp, de 35 años, nunca ha sido capaz de abandonar el nido. Ahora, sus desesperados padres no aguantan más. Ellos contratan a la atractiva y talentosa chica de sus sueños para que lo haga abandonar la casa familiar.

programme.title: Como si fuera cierto
programme.desc: David Abbott, un arquitecto solitario, encuentra un increíble apartamento en San Francisco, solo para descubrir que está embrujado por el espíritu del inquilino anterior, Elizabeth Masterson, una doctora superdotada que está en coma.

programme.title: El tren de la muerte
programme.desc: Jon Voight y Eric Roberts interpretan a un par de presos que en su fuga suben a un tren de mercancías, pero cuando el maquinista muere de un ataque al corazón, se encuentran atrapados, solos y a toda velocidad hacia un desastre seguro.

programme.title: El camino del oeste
programme.desc: Kirk Douglas, Robert Mitchum y Richard Widmark protagonizan esta suntuosa historia de los hombres y mujeres que dejaron la comodidad y seguridad de sus vidas por la promesa de una tierra libre y una vida mejor en el indómito Oeste.

programme.title: ¡Agáchate, maldito!
programme.desc: Un desenlace explosivo aguarda a un terrorista irlandés (James Coburn) obsesionado con la dinamita, quien se alía con un campesino mexicano convertido en revolucionario (Rod Steiger) en este trepidante relato de poder y política.

programme.title: Capulina contra Los monstruos
programme.desc: Capulina lee historias acerca de los monstrous y cree que existen en la realidad. Está muerto de miedo hasta que descubre que son imaginarios.

programme.title: Capulina contra Los Vampiros
programme.desc: Vampiros agresivos amenazan a Capulina hasta que el encuentra la manera de arrancarles los colmillos con unas pinzas de dentista. Los vampiros chimuelos se vuelven dóciles y beben leche en lugar de sangre.

programme.title: El Quijote
programme.desc: Don Quijote decide ayudar a Dorotea a recuperar su reino y luchar contra los odres, creyendo que son gigantes. La Santa Hermandad apresa a don Quijote y, con la complicidad del cura y el barbero, lo envían internado a su pueblo.

programme.title: La más grande historia jamás contada
programme.desc: La vida de Jesús en la Palestina ocupada por Roma: su nacimiento en Belén, su infancia en Nazaret, la última cena, la traición de su discípulo Judas, su juicio, crucifixión y posterior resurrección.

programme.title: PAID IN FULL
programme.desc: Un joven de Harlem, obligado a hacerle frente a la escena de las drogas de los 80, construye un imperio ilegal, pero empieza a sentir culpa. Cuenta con una exitosa banda sonora con canciones de Eric B. & Rakim, Boogie Down Productions, Guy y Jay-Z.

programme.title: Destrucción
programme.desc: Una detective de policía reconecta con gente relacionada con una misión encubierta de hace años para encontrar paz.

programme.title: Ronin
programme.desc: Un equipo de agentes especiales internacionales debe llevar a cabo una misión misteriosa: robar un maletín fuertemente custodiado buscado tanto por el IRA como por la mafia rusa.

programme.title: Manhattan en la oscuridad
programme.desc: Cuando una viuda seductora le pide a un periodista que resuelva la misteriosa muerte de su marido, la investigación lo sumerge en un peligroso mundo de adulterio, chantaje y asesinato.

programme.title: 11 Grados de Culpa
programme.desc: 11 ex-compañeros de colegio disfrutan de una opulenta celebración y son sorprendidos por la inesperada visita de Mónica que es asesinada en los jardines de la casa creando una investigación.

programme.title: Ladrón
programme.desc: Michael Mann (Hunter) dirige este elegante drama cargado de acción protagonizado por James Caan (Misery), un ladrón de cajas fuertes que planea su último golpe por el bien de una mujer, Tuesday Weld (Nieve que quema), y para empezar de cero.

programme.title: Asesino a Sueldo
programme.desc: Slevin (Josh Hartnett) se marcha de Los Ángeles, por un error de identidad cae en medio de una guerra entre los dos jefes criminales más temidos de la ciudad: El rabino (Ben Kingsley) y el jefe (Morgan Freeman).

programme.title: Regreso a Cold Mountain
programme.desc: Una historia dramática de amor en los principios de la Guerra Civil. Nicole Kidman, Jude Law y Renée Zellweger protagonizan esta película emotiva y que te atrapa del director ganador de un Óscar, Anthony Minghella’s (The English patient).

programme.title: El show de Truman: historia de una vida
programme.desc: Truman no sabe que su pueblo es un estudio gigante dirigido por un productor, director y creador visionario (Ed Harris), que la gente que trabaja y vive allí son actores de Hollywood, y que su alegre esposa también fue contratada.

programme.title: El lobo de Wall Street
programme.desc: Sexo. Dinero. Poder. Drogas. Prepárate a disfrutar de una historia del legendario cineasta Martin Scorsese. Leonardo DiCaprio interpreta a un corredor de bolsa en búsqueda de una vida llena de emociones, donde reina la corrupción y no hay límites.

programme.title: Fiebre Del Sabado Por La Noche
programme.desc: Protagonizado por John Travolta como Tony Manero, un talentoso bailarín de Brooklyn que busca escapar de su vida rutinaria a través de la música disco y las competiciones de baile, mientras enfrenta conflictos personales y familiares.

programme.title: Arcángel
programme.desc: El profesor Fluke Kelso se encuentra con un misterioso anciano vinculado a Joseph Stalin.

programme.title: La amante del teniente francés
programme.desc: Nominada a cinco premios de la Academia® (incluida la mejor actriz para Meryl Streep), esta obra maestra también está protagonizada por Jeremy Irons, en una de las historias de amor más impresionantes que jamás se hayan visto en pantalla.

programme.title: CAOS
programme.desc: Dos policías, un novato (Phillippe) y un veterano de cabellos grises (Statham), persiguen a un hábil ladrón de bancos (Snipes).

programme.title: Fuera de control
programme.desc: La sociedad moderna traza líneas entre el bien y el mal, la furia y la redención. Un momento de ensimismamiento y una chispa de ira harán que dos hombres las atraviesen. La lucha se intensifica, y las vidas de ambos cambian para siempre.

programme.title: Shaft (ESP)
programme.desc: Para detener a un asesino racista, Shaft tiene que rastrear al único testigo que puede dejarlo tras las rejas. Shaft se acerca a la par del peligro.

programme.title: Pisando fuerte
programme.desc: Cuando se trata de imponer la ley, un solo hombre puede marcar la diferencia. Dwayne 'la Roca' Johnson no tiene piedad al hacer imperar la justicia y aplastar la corrupción en esta historia de un hombre que decide actuar para recuperar su ciudad.

programme.title: Venganza
programme.desc: Durante su permiso de libertad provisional, un convicto logra escapar de los guardias y planea su venganza contra aquellos que lo convirtieron en un asesino a sangre fría.

programme.title: La suburban dorada
programme.desc: Un policía judicial es acusado de estar relacionado con el narcotráfico sólo por ayudar a su primo. Las circunstancias lo convierten en un fugitivo de la ley y por recuperar a su hijo tiene que involucrase con el narco.

programme.title: Elefante blanco
programme.desc: Un asesino es contratado por un hombre de negocios para vengar el asesinato de su hija por parte de traficantes de esclavos blancos en Tailandia.

programme.title: En el juego del asesino
programme.desc: Un detective corre contra-reloj para mantenerse un paso adelante del asesino serial, que dirige ataques mortales desde prisión. Henry Cavill y Ben Kingsley son los protagonistas de esta película llena de acción que no dejará de sorprenderte.

programme.title: El último maestro del aire
programme.desc: Aire, agua, tierra, fuego. Se enfrentan cuatro naciones atadas por el destino cuando el fuego inicia la guerra contra los demás. Atrapado entre la guerra, un Avatar descubre que es capaz de manipular los cuatro elementos.

programme.title: Héroe
programme.desc: Aclamada por la crítica y amada por el público, Jet Li, Maggie Cheung y Donnie Yen protagonizan una epopeya llena de acción, que fue nominada al Oscar y el Globo de Oro, donde un intrépido guerrero desafía a un imperio para unir a una nación.

programme.title: El monje
programme.desc: Chow Yun Fat y Seann William Scott protagonizan esta gran aventura, en la que un misterioso monje tibetano, quien ha protejido un pergamino por 60 años; cree que ha encontrado a su sucesor: un joven callejero.

programme.desc: Aire, agua, tierra, fuego. Se enfrentan cuatro naciones atadas por el destino cuando el fuego inicia la guerra contra los demás. Atrapado entre la guerra, un Avatar descubre que es capaz de manipular los cuatro elementos.

programme.title: El monje
programme.desc: Chow Yun Fat y Seann William Scott protagonizan esta gran aventura, en la que un misterioso monje tibetano, quien ha protejido un pergamino por 60 años; cree que ha encontrado a su sucesor: un joven callejero.

programme.title: La chica mecánica
programme.desc: Una chica robot sin nombre recibe el regalo de la vida, por parte de su creador. Mientras explora las maravillas del mundo ordinario, conoce un chico mutante increíble, con quien compartirá una amistad y deberá superar problemas familiares.

programme.title: ¿Y dónde está el policía? 2 1/2
programme.desc: Frank Drebin (Leslie Nielsen) adora el misterio. ¿Por qué estamos aquí? ¿Hay vida después del sexo? Sí, aborda los grandes temas, y el más grande es detener a Quentin Hapsburg (Robert Goulet) en su plan para destruir el medio ambiente.

programme.title: ¿Y dónde está el policia? 33 1/3: el insulto final

programme.title: S.O.S. Hay un loco suelto en el espacio
programme.desc: El héroe espacial Lone Starr (Bill Pullman) y su amigo medio canino Barf (John Candy) están en una misión en su casa rodante voladora para salvar a la princesa Vespa (Daphne Zuniga) de Dark Helmet (Rick Moranis) en una parodia inspirada en Mel Brooks.

programme.title: La Treintena
programme.desc: Cuatro amigos están a punto de entrar en la treintena en medio de la cuarentena por coronavirus.

programme.title: La Pantera Rosa
programme.desc: El torpe Inspector Clouseau (Steve Martin) se encarga de investigar el asesinato de un famoso entrenador de fútbol y el robo del diamante Pantera Rosa, de inestimable valor. Él y su compañero Gilbert Ponton (Jean Reno) van de calamidad en calamidad.

programme.title: Cantinflas
programme.desc: Cantinflas es la historia jamás contada de la mayor y más adorada estrella mexicana de la comedia de todos los tiempos.

programme.title: Ya veremos
programme.desc: Los padres de Santi están divorciados, y él está acostumbrado a vivir con ellos pero por separado. Tras una urgente cirugía para salvar su vista, Santi decide hacer una lista de deseos por cumplir pero con sus padres unidos.

programme.title: Mama para rato
programme.desc: En el Día Sagrado de las Muertes, una madre regresa y descubre que sus tres hijos son desconsiderados, feos y vagos.

programme.title: Cantinflas
programme.desc: Cantinflas es la historia jamás contada de la mayor y más adorada estrella mexicana de la comedia de todos los tiempos.

programme.title: Neruda
programme.desc: At the start of the Cold War, subversive Chilean senator and poet Pablo Neruda is pursued by police prefect Oscar Peluchonneau. Unable to flee the country, Neruda goes into hiding and becomes a symbol of liberty at home and in Europe.

programme.title: Ma Ma
programme.desc: Oscar-winner Penelope Cruz delivers the performance of her career as Magda, a woman who is determined to live life to the fullest in the face of her recent breast cancer diagnosis. In

programme.title: Amor, dolor & viceversa
programme.desc: Una película de crimen y suspenso sobre sueños inquietantes que se convierten en realidad para dos personas.

programme.title: Cómo cortar a tu patán
programme.desc: Amanda, una terapeuta especializada en ayudar a las mujeres a terminar las relaciones destructivas, vive lejos de los hombres y del compromiso. Dedicada al trabajo y la protección de su hermana Natalia.

programme.title: Stigmata
programme.desc: Una joven manifiesta estigmas como los que Jesucristo sufrió en su cricifixión. Ni médicos ni psiquiatras pueden darle ninguna explicación, sólo un sacerdote enviado por el Vaticano la ayudará, aunque tenga que ir en contra de algunas de sus creencias.

programme.title: Sabor a sangre y chocolate
programme.desc: Adaptación del relato de la autora Annette Curtis Klause acerca de una joven loba adolescente, que debe elegir entre su amor por un joven humano muy lindo y honrar la lealtad de la manada.

programme.title: Cazador de demonios
programme.desc: Un maldito pistolero (Wesley Snipes) cuyas víctimas regresan de entre los muertos, recluta a un joven guerrero para ayudar en la lucha contra una banda de zombies.

programme.title: Terrifier (ESP)
programme.desc: Art el payaso regresa y pone su mirada en tres mujeres jóvenes, junto con cualquiera que se meta en su camino.

programme.title: Terror en Amityville
programme.desc: En noviembre de 1974, una familia de seis miembros fue víctima de un brutal asesinato. Un año después, una pareja joven e inocente, George y Kathy Lutz, y sus hijos se mudan a una casa en la que ocurrió un terrible incidente.

programme.title: Pequeña Tienda De Los Horrores
programme.desc: Un joven torpe nutre una planta para luego descubrir que es carnívora.

programme.title: Abraham Lincoln contra los zombis
programme.desc: Mientras continúa la Guerra Civil, el presidente Abraham Lincoln debe emprender una tarea aún más desalentadora: destruir a los muertos vivientes confederados.

programme.title: Fuego en el cielo
programme.desc: En 1975, el leñador Travis Walteron y sus compañeros de trabajo descubrieron un ovni sobrevolando. Los amigos de Walton huyeron, pero Walton no tuvo tanta fortuna. Tras su abducción a la extraña nave, es sometido a un estudio médico doloroso.

programme.title: The Cowboy and the Lady
programme.desc: A lonely socialite masquerades as a maid and meets an unpretentious, plain-spoken cowboy who is unaware of her true identity.

programme.title: Support Your Local Sheriff!
programme.desc: James Garner stars in this rollicking western spoof that has him taking on the job of a frontier town sheriff who must fend off villains (led by Walter Brennen) from every direction...all without breaking a sweat or dirtying his shiny black boots!

programme.title: Support Your Local Gunfighter
programme.desc: James Garner is back in the saddle again as hustler Latigo Smith whose latest con is passing off cowhand Jug (Jack Elam) as the dreaded gunman Swifty Morgan. But when the real Swifty shows up, the Wild West is going to get a whole lot wackier!

programme.title: The Horse Soldiers
programme.desc: John Wayne, Constance Towers and William Holden star in this 1863, fact-based story about a Union mission to destroy a railroad junction deep within Confederate territory.

programme.title: Invitation to a Gunfighter
programme.desc: Screen legend Yul Brynner turns in a magnificent performance as a gunfighter who must do battle with his most formidable adversary - his own conscience - in this gripping, double-barreled western full of surprise twists and colorful villainy.

programme.title: Apache Country
programme.desc: Cavalry scouts Gene Autry & Pat Buttram are ordered to break up a ring which uses raids to cover up its activities. Carolina Cotton assists Gene and Pat, while seeking revenge against the gang leader.

programme.title: Barbed Wire
programme.desc: In 1878, Gene Autry is a cattle buyer who tries to settle a battle between the cattlemen and homesteaders, when the latter are worked up into a feverish pitch by unscrupulous landowner Steve Rutledge.

programme.title: Kit Carson
programme.desc: Indian fighter, trapper, and frontier scout Kit Carson leads a wagon train of settlers from Fort Bridger, along the Oregon Trail through Shoshone territory, to California, which plans to secede from Mexico.

programme.title: Cariboo Trail
programme.desc: Montanans Jim Redfern and Mike Evans head into Canada's British Columbia via the Cariboo Trail intent to raise cattle and dig for gold but find trouble instead.

programme.title: Artists and Models
programme.desc: A goonish young man receives telepathic top secret information in his nightmares, which are used by his artist friend in comic strips. Foreign agents and the CIA get interested.

programme.title: The Rat Race
programme.desc: A saxophonist (Tony Curtis) tries to share an apartment platonically with a dancer (Debbie Reynolds) in New York.

programme.title: Arrivederci, Baby!
programme.desc: A con man who marries and murders rich women meets a con lady with similar intentions.

programme.title: Sweet Smell of Success
programme.desc: A columnist and a press agent tear into the maelstrom of midtown Manhattan's night creatures in a sinister game that involves money, power and ultimately survival.

programme.title: The Manchurian Candidate
programme.desc: Frank Sinatra, Laurence Harvey, Janet Leigh, and Angela Lansbury headline an all-star cast in this daring thriller rife with political intrigue, mental manipulation, and a diabolical plot that may lead to the highest levels of the government.

programme.title: It's a Mad, Mad, Mad, Mad World
programme.desc: Spencer Tracy leads a hilariously zany cast of Hollywood's greatest comedians (including Milton Berle, Sid Caesar, Ethel Merman and Mickey Rooney) as eight vacation-bound motorists set off on a mad-cap, side-splitting race to find a stolen fortune!

programme.title: The Reivers
programme.desc: From the Pulitzer Prize-Winning novel by William Faulkner, Steve McQueen stars in the story of a Mississippi boy who drives to Memphis with two rascals in his family's new car—a 1905 Winton Flyer.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Part 3 of Sea Maneuvers, has Carter challenging the Petty Chief Officer to a boxing match not knowing the Chief was the Fleet Champ with 37 knockouts.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: While sitting in a restaurant, Gomer witnesses an automobile accident between Sergeant Carter and another driver. When in court Gomer takes the oath seriously to tell the truth, the whole truth and nothing but the truth.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: When Gomer's cousin Goober shows up in the barracks and puts on one of Gomer's uniforms and then wanders the base, everyone sees the name Pyle on the uniform and thinks Gomer is losing his mind.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer starts dating Sergeant Carter's sister. Carter is determined to break them up.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver (Eddie Albert) takes to his soap box, delivering fiery, patriotic speeches after getting a bill from the State Farm Unattached Duty Tax for an outrageous $12.03! But no one can figure out why the tax is levied in the first place.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa (Eva Gabor) is curious to learn about the book that Oliver (Eddie Albert) is reading. It is the real-life story of pioneers Gus and Etta Thompson. The episode flashes back to the 19th century with Oliver appearing as Gus and Lisa as Etta.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Eb (Tom Lester) seeks dating advice from the Douglas's after laying eyes on former classmate Betty Jo Bradley from petticoat Junction. Oliver's well-intentioned guidance has mixed results when Eb hilariously misconstrues the advice he's given.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: The locals complain that Oliver's penchant for wearing business suits to do farm work is ruining Hooterville's image. Oliver tries to adjust, but the last laugh is on him when Lisa has her dressmaker design Italian him some swanky new overalls.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: The Hooterville Chamber of Commerce attempts to attract a Hollywood film studio to shoot a movie in town. And when a rumor spreads that a famous actor is arriving, the townsfolk are all abuzz as they prepare for their close-up, Mr. DeMille!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Fed up with the house being in dire need of repair, Lisa demands that Oliver arrange to have the house redone or she's moving back to New York. Oliver agrees, but is delayed when Mr. Haney claims that their farmhouse is a historic monument.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Everything is topsy-turvy and henhouse hijinks ensue when one of the Douglas' hens is found to be laying square eggs! News of this kind gets around quickly, and the townsfolk all get in on the race to capitalize on the impressive novelty.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver is absolutely determined to have a truly old-fashioned Christmas, including decorating his own farm-grown tree. But warm weather stands in the way and, he discovers, the residents of Hooterville aren't exactly as traditional as he thought.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: In true Hooterville fashion, Oliver (Eddie Albert) discovers that the town is vehemently split as to which weather reporter they trust. As debates rage over which forecast is correct, Oliver plants his tomato crop, hoping for the best.

programme.title: All in the Family

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: ¿Quién fue el delincuente sexual que asesinó a dos muchachos adolescentes en Nebraska? La clave para detenerlo sería la composición única de la cuerda basura que usó para amarrar a sus víctimas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El fotógrafo profesional Charles Rathbun afirma que la modelo Linda Sobek murió durante un encuentro sexual consensuado que salió mal, pero el cadáver de Sobek y las imágenes digitales cuentan una historia más siniestra.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Viktorioso
programme.desc: Tres homicidios en dos continentes parecían ejecuciones profesionales. Los investigadores de ambos lados del Atlántico necesitaban averiguar si estaban relacionados.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se denuncia la desaparición de una mujer tras una pelea con su marido. La policía sospecha de un hombre que denunció un incendio en su automóvil. En el interior se encuentran dos diminutas gotas de sangre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Intruso Invisible
programme.desc: En 1996, la policía recibió una llamada de Darlie Routier informándoles de los asesinatos de sus hijos. La policía encontró al asesino tras analizar las salpicaduras de sangre, haciendo perfiles de comportamiento y analizando la llamada al 911 de Darlie.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se encontró a Janice Johnson muerta al pie de las escaleras del sótano. La policía de Nueva Escocia tuvo que desenredar las circunstancias que rodearon la muerte de Janice y responder a la pregunta: ¿Fue un accidente o un asesinato?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2008, la universitaria Jenna Verhaalen fue encontrada muerta en su departamento de Bryan, Texas y las hemorragias petequiales en sus ojos indicaron que fue estrangulada.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1989, los cadáveres de Joan Rogers y sus dos hijas adolescentes fueron encontrados flotando en la Bahía de Tampa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un caso inusual involucrando la violación y muerte de Nancy DePriest en 1988. Después de que Chris Ochoa confesara, el caso fue cerrado. 8 años después, Achim Marino confesó al mismo crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se descubrió un esqueleto humano en las marismas de Carolina del Norte y, cuando los investigadores descubrieron que había estado muerta durante 18 meses, sabían que sería difícil descubrir quién era, y mucho más quién la mató.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Marcado de por vida
programme.desc: Un hombre que había cometido delitos, incluido el asesinato, no fue capturado. Casi 50 años después, los avances en la tecnología y el análisis de la escritura descubrieron al criminal.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer desaparece y su esposo se convierte en el principal sospechoso – especialmente después de que la policía encuentra una gran mancha de sangre en la alfombra de su habitación.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de que el sospechoso fuera declarado culpable de incendio premeditado y asesinato, mantuvo su inocencia pero fue sentenciado a 25 años de prisión.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Destinado a la cárcel
programme.desc: Una mujer es encontrada muerta en un barranco, pero las fuertes tormentas habían arrastrado pruebas cruciales de la escena del crimen. En dos ocasiones, el rastro se estancó.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un niño de quince años muere a causa de una misteriosa herida de bala en la cabeza mientras está sentado en el vestíbulo del club de armas de su padre.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: ¿Cómo pudo el acosador obtener el código del sistema de seguridad del hogar de la víctima? ¿Cómo pudo robar sus fotografías personales? La policía necesitaba respuestas y las encontraron en el lugar más extraño.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1994, un cráneo humano recuperado de un estanque de Ohio revela un crimen espantoso. Las marcas en el cráneo indican que la víctima había sido apuñalada varias veces y que los dientes se le habían extraído con unos alicates de punta delgada.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una talentosa presentadora de noticias de televisión fue asesinada a tiros fuera de su casa; parecía ser un crimen pasional, perpetrado por un fanático obsesionado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Fuego Plástico
programme.desc: Sheila Bryan, quien fue condenada por matar a su madre en el incendio de un carro, recibe un nuevo juicio. La opinión de un testigo experto en incendios sobre cómo se encendió el fuego difiere de la teoría de la fiscalía.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra un cuerpo descompuesto metido en un barril, es fácil suponer un asesinato. Pero el cuerpo había sido colocado en el barril 30 años antes. Una de las pocas pistas fue una libreta de direcciones que se encontró junto con el cuerpo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2007, Shamaia Smith desaparece de un club de striptease en East Hartford, Connecticut. La policía considera varios patrones del club, pero se enfocan en un comerciante local, Kenneth Otto.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: A Prueba de Fuego
programme.desc: Un pirómano en serie inicia varios incendios que causan daños por un valor de millones de dólares y la muerte de tres personas. Él es descubierto, en parte, mediante el uso de hipnosis forense.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Acechado en la noche
programme.desc: Cuando una víctima es brutalmente asesinada en su propia cama, los investigadores encuentran una huella de zapato en el barro de afuera, evidencia física que esperan que conduzca al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un asesinato brutal, muchos sospechosos y pruebas contradictorias, pero los forenses fueron claros en una cosa: el asesino conocía a su víctima. Y eso les dio a los investigadores una ventaja.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una investigación sobre un asesinato se ve favorecida por un requisito legal de que los bares tengan cámaras de video instaladas en las instalaciones. Video, cabello y sangre conducen al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La víctima era un hombre que se forjó a sí mismo que nunca medía sus palabras. Quizás fue asesinado por un cliente o empleado descontento. Tal vez las fotos picantes en su caja fuerte tenían la pista para resolver el crimen.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: In this two-hour season premiere of Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team, 600 hopeful candidates arrive at Cowboys Stadium for the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders preliminary auditions.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Training Camp opens and many of the new candidates have had to uproot their lives and move to Dallas with no guarantee of making it through Training Camp to become a Dallas Cowboy Cheerleader.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It is just the second week of rehearsals and Kelli and Judy are quick to run the Training Camp Candidates through the signature kick line and jump split.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: In week three of training camp, the rookie candidates are brought in for their DCC makeover. Under the scrutiny of Kelli Finglass, new hairstyles and makeup applications give the girls the DCC look.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It's week five of training camp and Kelli is out sick. DCC Technical Director, Kitty Carter, fills in and runs the first rehearsal of the week.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Week 7 of training camp begins with a rehearsal on the field at Cowboys Stadium. Kelli and Judy are ready to make final cuts and tonight's rehearsal could determine who makes the squad.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: It's time to announce the DCC squad but first Kelli and Judy put the candidates through a final field rehearsal at Cowboys Stadium. Tensions run high among the girls as Kelli and Judy watch their every step.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The squad has their first game day performance behind them, but after a bad rehearsal, Kelli warns her new team she will cut girls if they don't give 110 percent.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders take a break from the sidelines and travel to Mexico for their annual swimsuit calendar photo shoot.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders are in full dance mode preparing for their first regular-season home game performance. Kelli and Judy want the choreography to be perfect and press the girls through a few intense rehearsals.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: In the final episode of the series, the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders are preparing for their marquee performance - The Susan G. Komen Cancer Awareness Halftime Show during a nationally televised Cowboys football game.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Dreams are on the line as the tryouts for the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders 2013-2014 squad begin.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The pressure is mounting as 54 new candidates compete with 32 returning veterans for an invitation into the famed Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders training camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Training camp begins at the Cowboys famous training facility, Valley Ranch. First Meeting is filled with excitement and energy until Kelli calls a special meeting of the veterans.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The "scariest night of training camp" kicks off this dramatic episode as the girls learn the dreaded jumpsplit! It's mind over body, as the girls attempt this famed and required move.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The ladies are really challenged when guest choreographer DJ Guthrie teaches them a new dance style. Kelli and Judy have some tough decisions to make about who will remain on the squad.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The training camp candidates hold their breath as the one and only Kitty Carter pays a visit to training camp. Kitty takes no prisoners as she rips into the new girls as well as the vets.

programme.desc: The 2004 murder of a young casino sales executive in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Pimp My Gurney
programme.desc: Waking up with 15 girls, Flav quickly presents their first challenge. Flav's looking for a girl that can mend his broken heart.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Reindeer Games
programme.desc: Flav asks the remaining 13 girls to create a theme restaurant for him.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Things That Go Bump On The Lip
programme.desc: Flav splits his ladies up into two teams for the first ever Flavorette Roast Challenge. Each team picks one girl from the other team to put in the hot seat, and they cut loose with a full on verbal beatdown.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: The Lyin The Witch And The Wardrobe Malfunction
programme.desc: Flavor Flav is looking for someone who can be a mother as well as a mate, so he has the girls create a bedtime story for a group of children.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Dial M For Mystery Pimp Caller?
programme.desc: Flavor Flav is looking for a woman with the “Total Package.” And now, with only eight women left in his house, he has devised the “Total Package Challenge” to judge who offers the most.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Halitosis Ohmyosis
programme.desc: Flav challenges the final six girls to a calendar shoot showing off the bodies of the year.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: A Night At The Hip Hopera
programme.desc: With the latest twist still fresh and furious on the Flavorettes' minds, two new alliances quickly form in the house.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: Flav is so smitten with the remaining nine girls that he's going to marry them!

programme.title: Flavor of Love: The Neverwed Game
programme.desc: The remaining seven girls are in for a big surprise when they find themselves on the set of the first ever “Neverwed Game” starring Arsenio Hall as the host and their own ex-boyfriends!

programme.title: Flavor of Love: When Flavorettes Attack
programme.desc: Flav bring his five remaining girls to "Big Boy's Neighborhood" on LA's biggest Hip Hop Radio Station to have live callers help him decide which girl is right for him.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Its A Family Flav Fair
programme.desc: With only four women left vying for Flav's affection the moment of truth has arrived, meeting the parents.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Von Boyage
programme.desc: After the last elimination, Flav tells his final three girls to pack their bags because they are heading to Cannes, France!

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Clip Show
programme.desc: Episode 14 is a clip show with never before seen footage.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Parlez Vous Flavor
programme.desc: After a season of ups and downs and a dramatic twist of plans in Cannes, it's down to Flav's final girls.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In a brutal world where nature is both friend and foe, the ancient powers are just beginning. They must use all their skill and ingenuity to shape their territory and establish their cultures.

programme.title: Ancient Powers

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: To pay for armies and other costs, the ancient powers had to tax territories and monetise their assets. But in this world of commerce, ancient societies stored their wealth in different ways.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In a world where enemies watch for weakness, the ancient powers must use all their strength and cunning to defend their people, conquer new lands, and rise to the challenge of the battlefield.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In an unruly world, the ancient powers must lead their people, create ways to govern and keep rebellion at bay. To achieve this, they may invent caste systems, organise gladiatorial games or turn to gods.

programme.title: Ancient Powers

programme.title: Lost Cities of The Ancients

programme.title: Lost Cities of The Ancients

programme.title: Lost Cities of The Ancients
programme.desc: It was one of the greatest vanishing acts in history. More than 3,000 years ago a mysterious and ruthless civilisation rose from nothing, created a brutal and unstoppable army and built an empire that rivalled Egypt and Babylon.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.desc: When court clerk Peter Porco doesn't report to work in November 2004, a courts officer is ordered to the Porcos' family home in Bethlehem, NY.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: This episode documents a deadly bombing at a church in Oakwood, Illinois, in December 1997.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: There was no clear reason for a young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the coroner discovered a tiny clue during the autopsy, investigators were able to uncover a mystery filled with betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman is stabbed more than 100 times. The killer leaves DNA behind, but investigators must play a cat-and-mouse game to obtain a suspect's DNA to match.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Doctors don't know why a young scientist has fallen gravely ill. When tests finally reveal the cause, it's too late to save him.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police discover a bullet-riddled car, a missing driver and no witnesses. Had the victim been abducted or was she dead? The answers are found in a unique clue, so tiny it was measured in millionths of a meter.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Even though their daughter had run away before, she had always come back. Her parents were sure this time would be no different, but they were wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a college student vanished without a trace, her fellow students were concerned about her safety and their own.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim was well liked and successful, which made the brutality of the crime even harder to understand.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An assistant manager of a Florida steakhouse is stabbed to death. It appears to be a robbery gone wrong, but a bloody fingerprint reveals that he knew his killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Tracey Frame, 35, was convicted of killing David Nixon in April 2002 after he planned to end their relationship.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.desc: Foul play is suspected when Fort Worth factory worker Glenda Furch disappears after completing her shift.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: The Princess and the EVP

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: A Serial Killer's Revenge
programme.desc: Jason and the TAPS team head to Charleston, South Carolina, one of the most haunted cities in America and winner of Ghost Hunters America's Hometown Ghost Hunt Contest.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Camp Fear
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, Jason and TAPS go to camp! They head to Camp Rutledge in Georgia where a woman has experienced paranormal activity since she was a teenager.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: French Quarter Massacre
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads out to New Orleans, Louisiana to investigate their first case without Grant: The Jimani Lounge Massacre.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Don't Feed the Apparition
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS revisits a familiar city, Alexandria, Louisiana, but this time, they're there to investigate the Alexandria Zoo.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Ghostly Refuge
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Oswego, New York to investigate the renowned Fort Ontario. TAPS has investigated many forts, but never one that once served as a sanctuary for Jewish refugees during World War II.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Paranormal Politics
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads down South to help two different families find some closure. First stop is Baton Rouge, Louisiana to investigate the Old State Capital Building, which has endured theCivil War and a congressman's death.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Curtain Call
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Joliet, Illinois to investigate the Rialto Square Theater, which is becoming known for being more than just an entertainment venue.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Fear Factory
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Claremont, New Hampshire to investigate a former shoe and furniture factory, the Topstone Mill. What was once an abandoned space has now become a restaurant and bar...

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Tunnels of Terror
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Lockport, New York to investigate an underworld of tunnels. It holds a mystery of possible murder, multiple deaths and frightening phenomena. What stories do the spirits of Lockport Caves want to tell?

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Heir Apparition
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Hampton Falls, New Hampshire to investigate the Governors Mansion, a property Steve has investigated before with a local team.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: Whale with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: The surprising similarities humans share with whales; Steve goes on an underwater expedition to learn about singing humpbacks, matriarchal sperm whales and playful dolphins and examines how humans early fear of whales eventually turned to wonder.

programme.title: Wild Pacific Rescue
programme.desc: The team saves a massive sea lion caught in a plastic noose; a visit to the Rescue Centre where a harbor seal pup may lose its eyesight; a baby sea otter needs a risky but life-saving surgery.

programme.title: Shadowlands
programme.desc: New Zealand's dark fjords harbor creatures normally found in the deep; as winter approaches, bottlenose dolphins must escape their freezing fjord, while in a mountain river, a longfin eel heeds the call of the sea.

programme.title: Under the Sea
programme.desc: Learn sea creatures' tricks for parenthood, predation, survival and adaptation.

programme.title: Whale Guardian
programme.desc: Whale researcher, Nan Hauserat, is in the Cook Islands to research humpback whales.

programme.title: Islands: Nature's Wild Laboratories
programme.desc: Off the eastern coast of Australia lies K'gari, also known as Fraser Island; it is the largest sand island in the world where every meal is hard won; there's a tropical rainforest on top of the dunes.

programme.title: The Magic Circle of the Reef
programme.desc: Pelagic beings live in the so-called reef water column, the zone between the seabed and the surface. They are species that travel the sea placidly, feeding when they are hungry and swimming slowly throughout their lives.

programme.title: Alien Abyss
programme.desc: Feeling the love in the strange-but-heartwarming partnerships between some of Earth's oddest creatures; diving deep to see strange animals, from snapping shrimp to wolf eels, offer a hand to their fellow ocean-going weirdos to ensure mutual survival.

programme.title: Under the Sea
programme.desc: Skill, speed and strength of the oceans' fastest and fiercest.

programme.title: Into the Blue
programme.desc: Southeast Asia's Coral Triangle, the world's epicenter of marine biodiversity is facing a collapse due to accelerating threats, primarily global warming causing mass coral bleaching, unsustainable fishing and pollution.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: Bighorn rams rattle the mountaintops; Brown bears battle, desperate to fatten up for winter; Sharp-tailed grouse shake their tail-feathers; Wild stallions rumble with beauty and grace.

programme.title: Hot life in Africa
programme.desc: Get to know the savannah's master of camouflage and a shade-making squirrel.

programme.title: Wild Argentina: Extreme Earth
programme.desc: Argentina's towering peaks, vast steppes and huge glaciers are home to some of the most rugged creatures on the planet.

programme.title: Europe's Amazon

programme.title: The Hills

programme.desc: From amazing ancient Roman aqueducts and arch bridges, romantic Renaissance spans, 19th-century railroad crossovers, to monumental marvels of our time, bridges played a key role in the human quest to connect and unify.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un hombre entra en shock anafiláctico; un tipo rudo teme a las agujas; un hombre se apuñala con una espada ninja; Un paciente cree que necesita un exorcismo.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Los médicos usan un robot operado por un especialista en otro hospital para tratar a un niño de 7 años con convulsiones

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una joven enfermera se derrumba en la sala de emergencias, y sus compañeros de trabajo deben reiniciar su corazón. Un joven padre lleva a su bebé al hospital convencido de que hay gusanos en sus manos.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Dos pacientes ingresan en la sala de emergencias, ambos experimentan convulsiones; el pulmón de un anciano se derrumba, y su joven esposa y su hija pelean por él.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: El Dr. Warren Yamarick se enfrenta a uno de los momentos más difíciles de la medicina: tratar a su propio colega. El Dr. Armand Dorian pronto descubre que su sala de emergencias está inundada de estudiantes borrachos.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un médico con alergia grave a las abejas es picado mientras trata a un paciente crítico que ha sido apuñalado en el ojo; un hombre ingresa a la sala de emergencias después de cortarse la garganta.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un joven tiene un tubo de 2 pulgadas atravesado en su cabeza, que debe ser removido rápidamente; una joven novia está sangrando incontrolablemente, desconcertando a su médico.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una mujer se queja de dolores de estómago después de comer papel higiénico; un recluso tiene fiebre de 108 grados.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Vea algunos de los casos más locos de Urgencias.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: El corazón de una víctima de apuñalamiento tiene un agujero en él y debe ser bombeado a mano para mantenerlo vivo.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The team comes across a small village with a revered leader. Beckett soon becomes so enamored by his host he brings him to Atlantis. But soon, McKay discovers that Lucius is using some sort of pheromone to enchant those around him.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Exploring a village, the team is suddenly attacked and taken prisoner as Ronon had unknowingly lured the Wraith there. The villagers set Sheppard and Teyla free, who mobilize a strike force. When they return, the village has been devastated.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can effect cures.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In Columbus, Ohio, a woman is found shot in the head. The death is ruled a suicide, but something is not right and detectives refuse to let the matter rest.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Men don't have a monopoly on murder, but it's still extraordinary when women kill. Though female killers are as deadly as males, they choose less violent methods.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Three hairs… microscopic fibers… a common trash bag ripped from a roll. Seemingly small and insignificant clues become a victim's silent witness.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Toxicology: While drugs can cure disease and ease pain, they can also be agents of murder. Toxicologists can examine blood and tissue to uncover cases where death is not as natural as it may seem–from slow arsenic poisoning to quick cocaine overdoses.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Black Boxes: Little evidence is left after an airplane takes a deadly plunge from the sky. Investigators' best hope for an answer comes from the flight data recorder known as a “black box.”

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A killer may strike in the middle of the night, and hide clues well. But the police are always there, ready and working, and they will never give up when they're on the trail of criminals who decide it's Killing Time.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people do get away with murder…at least for a while. Flush with their success, serial killers murder again and again. But each time they kill, they leave behind a few more clues, which ultimately lead to their capture.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic Sculpting: Forensic sculptors retrieve people from oblivion. Using clay and an intricate knowledge of anatomy, forensic arts place a face on an unidentified skull, recreating the victim's likeness, which often leads to his name.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people murder for love. But these killers did it for the money. When greed is the motive, investigators must make every clue pay off.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Drug trafficking has spawned a violent and deadly criminal underground. It's providing a challenge to forensic investigators devoted to cracking drug rings.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some of the best clues come from the least likely places. Baffling crimes have been solved and criminals betrayed through evidence provided by insects, beer bottles, and other seemingly meaningless objects.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Bombers, snipers, spree killers: some people don't care who they kill, they just want to hurt innocent people.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Most victims of multiple murderers are meticulously chosen because of a mutual connection with the killer or because they match an intricate set of criteria that fits the killer's MO.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Ballistic analysis is the key to finding killers who turn guns on their victims. Each shot fired leaves its own “fingerprint”, allowing scientists to target murderers with deadly aim.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.desc: A pair of newlyweds stopping in a small town are trapped by their own superstition when playing a fortune-telling machine in a local diner.

programme.desc: The daughter of an inventor objects to their 'perfect' home where they are waited on by mechanical servants.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: In a tragic, western town, a desperate father begs for clemency as his son is slated to die for an accident he could not have prevented.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: At a prominent club in Washington, D.C., a socialite argues about whether it would be possible to change history by traveling back in time. When he leaves the club he finds himself in 1865, on the night that President Lincoln will be shot.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
